win_condition: Liberals win by enacting 5 Liberal policies or executing Hitler; Fascists win by enacting 6 Fascist policies or electing Hitler as Chancellor after 3 Fascist policies
message: Secret Hitler has no VP. Liberals win by completing 5 Liberal policies or by executing Hitler. Fascists win by completing 6 Fascist policies or by electing Hitler as Chancellor after 3+ Fascist policies are enacted.
